---
name: Question
about: Ask a question about the project
title: '[QUESTION] '
labels: question
assignees: ''
---

## ❓ Question

A clear and concise question about the project.

## 🔍 Context

What are you trying to accomplish? What have you tried so far?

## 📚 Documentation Checked

Have you checked the documentation?
- [ ] [README.md](../../README.md)
- [ ] [User Guide](../../hilfe/)
- [ ] [CONTRIBUTING.md](../../CONTRIBUTING.md)
- [ ] [Security Policy](../../SECURITY.md)

## 💻 Environment (if relevant)

- OS: [e.g., Ubuntu 22.04]
- Python Version: [e.g., 3.11.5]
- Tool Version: [e.g., 4.0.0-qt6]

## 📝 Additional Information

Any other information that might help us answer your question.

---

**Note:** For general discussions, consider using [GitHub Discussions](../../discussions) instead.
